item.powercaeds.totem_card.desc: Passively saves you from lethal damage, then goes on a 5 minute cooldown.
item.powercaeds.dash_card.desc: Dash 10 blocks in the direction you are looking. Grants Slow Falling for 3s.
item.powercaeds.midas_card.desc: Passively turns your items and blocks beneath you into gold. Increases your size.
item.powercaeds.skeleton_card.desc: Shoots a strong arrow in your aim direction.
item.powercaeds.ghast_card.desc: Launches an empowered fireball in your aim direction.
item.powercaeds.ancient_card.desc: Fires a 15-block magic beam that damages and slows enemies.
item.powercaeds.glock_card.desc: 8 charges. Fires a hitscan shot for 4 damage. Empty magazine triggers 30s cooldown.
item.powercaeds.nova_card.desc: Creates paired portals; entering the first teleports you to the second.
item.powercaeds.miner_card.desc: Mines a 3x3 tunnel 30 blocks forward, drains water, cools lava, and places torches.
item.powercaeds.blaze_card.desc: Grants powered elytra flight for up to 5 minutes. Landing ends the flight.
item.powercaeds.anchor_card.desc: First use stores an anchor. Second use returns you to it from any dimension.
item.powercaeds.forcewall_card.desc: Creates a protected yellow glass dome for 15 seconds. Allies inside regenerate and saturate.
item.powercaeds.freeze_card.desc: Throws a snowball that starts a freezing storm at impact.
item.powercaeds.timestop_card.desc: Freezes ticks and nearby players for 6 seconds.
item.powercaeds.invis_card.desc: Grants invisibility and Resistance II for 10 minutes, ending early on attacks or block interaction.
item.powercaeds.mayhem_card.desc: Launches 8 delayed ender pearls in different directions.
item.powercaeds.turm_card.desc: Ground dash breaks through enemies. Air use slams down into an explosion.
item.powercaeds.deep_card.desc: Summons fish, or underwater fish torpedoes. Passively empowers swimming.
item.powercaeds.artz_card.desc: Passive tentacles grant climbing, fall immunity, haste, extra hearts, and doubled melee damage.
item.powercaeds.md49_card.desc: Passive decay form with cursed armor, rot aura, undead healing, and dark withering attacks.
